## Design & Development
**Multidisciplinary Expertise for Smart & Integrated Solutions**
###  Electronic Design   
PCB & PCBA 
End-to-end design, manufacturing, and integration of electronic boards engineered for harsh environments and demanding applications. 
###  Embedded Software Design 
Custom firmware and software development tailored to industry standards, with a strong emphasis on quality, validation, and performance. 
###  Mechanical Design 
Product/process integration and co-design from the earliest development stages, ensuring technical constraints are addressed seamlessly. 
###  Wiring & Cable Design 
Development of customized harnesses and cable assemblies optimized for each unique application. 
[ Explore ](https://onetech-group.com/design-development/)
